title: PMB For Lunar Client
description: Premier Minecraft Baseball official modpack for Lunar Client
body:
This Modpack will give you the option to play on Lunar
- Made For Lunar Client Users

In Order To See The Baseball Past 64 Blocks **(Required)**, Follow These Steps
1. Open Mod Menu
2. Find the "**Entity View Distance Mod**" 
3. Click On The Settings Slide Bar
4. Scroll Down And Find **"Snowball"**
5. Change **"Snowball"** Distance to **"512"**

**Disclaimers:** 
- **I Am Not Affiliated With Lunar Client**
